relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a high-quality asset with 20%+ long-term Subscription Revenue growth potential, a strong and expanding FCF margin proﬁle (>30%), and a solid balance sheet.
relationships.quantifier: 20%+ long-term Subscription Revenue growth potential, FCF margin proﬁle (>30%)
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight ServiceNow as a high-quality asset with 20%+ long-term Subscription Revenue growth potential, a strong and expanding FCF margin proﬁle (>30%), and a solid balance sheet, meeting the key characteristics of a defensive software asset while still providing growth at-scale.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a high-quality asset with best-in-class unit economics, at a Rule of 60+ proﬁle in FY24.
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight Monday.com in the current macro environment as a high-quality asset with best-in-class unit economics, at a Rule of 60+ proﬁle in FY24, which we believe justiﬁes a premium vs. peers.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a high-quality asset with durable 20%+ revenue growth and high-20s/low-30% FCF margin through FY27.
relationships.quantifier: durable 20%+ revenue growth, high-20s/low-30% FCF margin through FY27
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight Atlassian in the current macro environment as a high-quality asset with durable 20%+ revenue growth and high-20s/low-30% FCF margin through FY27.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a high-quality asset with an attractive combination of mid-20s topline growth and 25%+ FCFM.
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight Snowﬂake in the current macro environment as a high-quality asset with an attractive combination of mid-20s topline growth and 25%+ FCFM, supported by stabilizing fundamentals and solidiﬁcation of long-term growth strategy under the current management.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a high-quality asset with an attractive combination of 26% top-line growth and 29% FCFM as of FY24.
relationships.quantifier: 26% top-line growth and 29% FCFM as of FY24
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight Datadog in the current macro environment as a high-quality asset with an attractive combination of 26% top-line growth and 29% FCFM as of FY24.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a best-in-class growth asset that can drive 20%+ ARR growth long-term with an elevated FCF margin expansion cadence.
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight Rubrik in the current macro environment as a best-in-class growth asset that can drive 20%+ ARR growth long-term with an elevated FCF margin expansion cadence.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a best-in-class compounding growth asset that can continue to deliver 30%+ topline growth amid broader macro uncertainty.
relationships.original_sentence: We highlight Samsara as a best-in-class compounding growth asset that can continue to deliver 30%+ topline growth amid broader macro uncertainty.

relationships.relationship_description: Highlighted as a best-in-class compounding growth asset that can continue to drive mid-20s growth and expanding FCF margins.

relationships.original_sentence: We highlight GitLab as a best-in-class compounding growth asset that can continue to drive mid-20s growth and expanding FCF margins amid broader macro uncertainty.

relationships.relationship_description: Lowered 12-month price target to $750 as multiples are updated to mark-to-market given the recent sell-off in software.

relationships.quantifier: price target to $450, 33x Q5-Q8 EV/FCF, 27x Q5-Q8 P/E
relationships.original_sentence: Our 12-month price target to $450 is derived from an equal weighting of a DCF (~3% perpetuity growth rate, unchanged), 33x Q5-Q8 EV/FCF , and 27x Q5-Q8 P/E.

relationships.original_sentence: We lower our 12-month Price Target to $340 (vs. $400 prior) as we adjust our target multiple to reﬂect the broader de-rating in software, particularly to better align with large cap peers.

relationships.original_sentence: We lower our 12-month price target to $130 (vs. $185 prior) as we market-to-market our multiple given the de-rating across broader software while opting to remove EV/Sales multiple, which we believe is appropriate given that the company has reached maturity at scale with steady revenue growth.

relationships.relationship_description: Lowered 12-month Price Target to $220 as EV/Sales multiple is lowered to better reﬂect MongoDB’s forward growth proﬁle.
relationships.original_sentence: We lower our 12-month Price Target to $220 (vs. $335 prior) as we lower our EV/Sales multiple to better reﬂect MongoDB’s forward growth proﬁle to commensurate with Rule-of-35+ peers, and introduce an EV/FCF multiple of 28x to reﬂect MongoDB’s progress in delivering material positive FCF’s in the past two years and our expectation for continued FCF growth ahead (>40% from FY25-27).
